category_sources: source_facts.description identifies helmsman as a Helm Charts as Code tool.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives the project/formula name as helmsman.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project page; README is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/mkubaczyk/helmsman, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states Helm Charts as Code; source_facts.executables lists the helmsman CLI.
